tool_args.label: M15 Select Bus Service
tool_args.raw_text: M15: First Av/Second Av - Connects the Bronx to Brooklyn. Implemented in 2010. 15-18% reduction in travel time. 10% increase in ridership.

tool_args.label: B44 Select Bus Service
tool_args.raw_text: B44: Nostrand Ave/Rogers Ave - Connects the Bronx to Brooklyn.

tool_args.label: Bx12 Select Bus Service
tool_args.raw_text: Bx12: Fordham Rd/Pelham Pkwy - Connects Westchester County to the Bronx.

tool_args.label: Bx41 Select Bus Service
tool_args.raw_text: Bx41: Webster Av - Connects the Bronx to Brooklyn.

tool_args.label: M34/M34A Select Bus Service

tool_args.label: S79 Select Bus Service

tool_args.label: M60 Select Bus Service
tool_args.raw_text: M60: 125 St./Astoria Blvd. to LGA - Connects the Bronx to Queens.

tool_args.label: M86 Select Bus Service
tool_args.raw_text: M86 Select Bus Service - The M86 bus corridor was identified as a potential candidate for Select Bus Service in the Bus Rapid Transit: Phase II Study (2009).

payload.description: Proposed SBS on the M86 corridor from West End Avenue/Broadway to York Avenue/E 92nd Street

tool_args.label: 86th Street Corridor
tool_args.raw_text: The M86 bus corridor was identified as a potential candidate for Select Bus Service. Route starts at West End Av and Broadway, proceeds east along W 86 St, continues east along E 86 St, then turns north along York Av through E 91 St and E 92 St.

payload.description: The M86 bus corridor runs east-west along West 86th Street and East 86th Street from Broadway to York Avenue, then north to East 92nd Street.

tool_args.label: M86 Corridor identified in BRT Phase II Study
tool_args.raw_text: The M86 bus corridor was identified as a potential candidate for Select Bus Service in the 'Bus Rapid Transit: Phase II Study' (2009).

payload.claim_text: The M86 bus corridor was identified as a potential candidate for Select Bus Service in the 'Bus Rapid Transit: Phase II Study' (2009).
payload.source: Bus Rapid Transit: Phase II Study (2009)

tool_args.label: Step 1: Data Collection and Analysis - Fall 2014
tool_args.raw_text: Step 1: Data collection and analysis - Fall 2014 - Analyze full M86 corridor: Traffic counts, Safety data, Transit operations, Ridership / transfer data, Sources of delay

payload.description: Step 1: Data collection and analysis - Analyze full M86 corridor including traffic counts, safety data, transit operations, ridership/transfer data, sources of delay

tool_args.label: Step 2: Conceptual Design - Fall/Winter 2014
tool_args.raw_text: Step 2: Conceptual design - Fall/Winter 2014 - Identify feasible street design changes and determine impacts on: Transit travel time and reliability, Traffic flow, Safety, Parking / delivery access. Develop possible bus stop changes. Solicit input from Community Boards.

payload.description: Step 2: Conceptual design - Identify feasible street design changes and determine impacts on transit travel time and reliability, traffic flow, safety, parking/delivery access. Develop possible bus stop changes. Solicit input from Community Boards.

tool_args.label: Step 3: Develop Corridor Plan - Early 2015
tool_args.raw_text: Step 3: Develop corridor plan - Early 2015 - Develop detailed street design, Prepare traffic analysis, Finalize SBS Station Locations, Refine details with Community Boards

payload.description: Step 3: Develop corridor plan - Develop detailed street design, prepare traffic analysis, finalize SBS Station Locations, refine details with Community Boards

tool_args.label: Step 4: Implementation - Mid 2015
tool_args.raw_text: Step 4: Implementation - Mid 2015 - Develop implementation plan, Launch SBS service, Coordinate with DDC Capital Project

payload.description: Step 4: Implementation - Develop implementation plan, Launch SBS service, Coordinate with DDC Capital Project

tool_args.label: Next Steps - Fall 2014
tool_args.raw_text: Fall 2014 - Analyze traffic and transit data. Develop Conceptual Design.

payload.description: Analyze traffic and transit data. Develop Conceptual Design.

tool_args.label: Next Steps - Winter 2015
tool_args.raw_text: Winter 2015 - Discuss detailed plans with Community Boards

payload.description: Discuss detailed plans with Community Boards
